days.text: Mainly cloudy. One or two showers. Force 4 to 5 easterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Force 3 to 4 easterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 2 to 3 east to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 2 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds, occasionally force 5.
